headline: What Humana (HUM)'s Lowered 2026 EPS Outlook and Buybacks Mean For Shareholders
summary: In late April 2026, Humana Inc. reported first‑quarter revenue of US$39,648 million and net income of US$1,186 million, completed a US$276.13 million share repurchase program, and lowered its full‑year 2026 GAAP diluted EPS guidance to at least US$8.36. Alongside its earnings update and guidance revision, Humana’s foundation released new research on under‑recognized mental health needs among Florida’s rapidly growing senior population, highlighting longer‑term care and cost pressures. We’ll...
